name: Proposition 65
what_it_does: Warning and discharge requirements for chemicals on the OEHHA Prop 65 list.
jurisdiction: OEHHA lists; enforced by the AG, DAs, and private litigants

hypotheses.question: Does the facility expose people to a Prop 65-listed chemical above safe-harbor levels?
hypotheses.claim_to_test: Businesses with 10+ employees must warn before exposing individuals to a listed chemical above its safe-harbor level.
